$schemaDescription: Sample product installer manifest. Demonstrates the minimum viable shape: 1 skill + 1 agent + 1 rule + 1 bundle. The schema is identical across all downstream products — only ids and paths change.

sample:hello-world.description: Minimal hello-world skill demonstrating the SKILL.md frontmatter contract.

sample:demo-bundle-skill.description: Bundle-profile skill that pulls in the sample agent + rule via dependencies.

sample:host-context.description: Demo skill exercising the unified host-instructions Skill Metadata key consumed by nexel activate.

example-agent.description: Minimal sample agent — demonstrates agent frontmatter and installedName mapping.

rules/sample-rule.md.description: Minimal sample rule — plain markdown, no frontmatter.

sample-demo.description: Demo bundle that installs the demo-bundle-skill plus its agent + rule dependencies.
